name: North Pole Cherry Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 baked 9-inch pie shell or crumb crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the slightly softened ice cream evenly in the prepared pie shell.
2. Freeze until ready to serve.
3. About one hour before serving, spread the cherry pie filling over the top of the ice cream layer.
4. Return the pie to the freezer.
5. Serve quickly for best taste and texture.
